name: hustlr-monorepo
description: One-command dev: ML (8000) + Node API (3000) + optional Flutter

scripts.dev:ml: cd hustlr-ml && set PYTHONUTF8=1 && python -m uvicorn main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -k -c blue,magenta -n ml,api "npm run dev:ml" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -c blue,magenta,green -n ml,api,flutter "npm run dev:ml" "npm run dev:api" "flutter run -d chrome --dart-define=HUSTLR_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:3000"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently -k -c blue,magenta,green -n ml,api,flutter "npm run dev:ml" "npm run dev:api" "flutter run -d chrome --dart-define=HUSTLR_API_BASE=http://127.0.0.1:3000"
